title: Stop Asking ChatGPT To Compute RSI. It’s Embarrassing For Both Of You.
author: Outrageous_Fall_1727
selftext:
*Why technical analysis belongs in a tool, not a context window.* A 4 minute read on why you shouldn't paste raw market data to your AI assisntant. The blog post is targeted towards stock technical analysis but the learnings can be applied in other scenarios.  
TLDR: don't ask your AI to do complex math.
